title: This Chinese consumer stock could double if its global industrial pivot succeeds, JPMorgan says
summary: JPMorgan analysts believe a Chinese home appliance company could double in value if it successfully expands globally into industrial markets. The investment bank's report highlights the company's potential to become a major international player and gave multiple stocks in the sector overweight ratings.
content: A Chinese home appliance company has the chance to become a global player, JPMorgan analysts said in a report that gave several stocks an overweight rating.

zh.title: 摩根大通表示，如果这家中国消费品股票的全球工业转向成功，其股价可能翻倍
zh.summary: 摩根大通分析师认为，如果一家中国家电公司成功扩展到全球工业市场，其价值可能翻倍。该投资银行的报告强调了该公司成为主要国际参与者的潜力，并对该行业的多支股票给出了超配评级。

title: Highly charismatic people use 5 'magnetic' phrases to be more likable, says public speaking expert
summary: Public speaking expert Vanessa Van Edwards has identified five key phrases that charismatic individuals use to enhance likability and strengthen relationships. These communication techniques are grounded in research about what makes people magnetic and offers actionable insights for improving interpersonal skills.
content: Public speaking expert and author Vanessa Van Edwards reveals the phrases that highly charismatic people use to build better relationships.

zh.title: 公众演讲专家表示，高度魅力人士使用5个"吸引人"的短语来增强魅力
zh.summary: 公众演讲专家凡妮莎·范·爱德华兹确定了五个关键短语，魅力人士使用这些短语来增强吸引力并加强人际关系。这些沟通技巧基于关于是什么使人具有磁性吸引力的研究，为改进人际交往技能提供了可行的见解。

title: My husband won’t sell his home so we can live together full time. Is this a red flag after a decade of marriage?
summary: A person in a decade-long marriage is questioning whether their spouse's reluctance to sell his home and consolidate their households signals a deeper relationship problem. The couple maintains separate homes 20 miles apart, with the husband commuting daily despite being married.
content: “Our homes are 20 miles apart, and he still drives back and forth almost daily.”

zh.title: 我的丈夫不愿意卖掉他的房子，所以我们不能住在一起。在婚姻十年后，这是一个危险信号吗？
zh.summary: 一个婚姻长达十年的人正在质疑他们配偶不愿卖掉房子并合并家庭是否预示了更深层的关系问题。这对夫妇分别住在相距20英里的两个家里，丈夫每天通勤，尽管他们已经结婚。

title: Israel says its military attacked Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburbs
summary: Israel's military conducted strikes on Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburbs in response to the group launching three projectiles toward Israeli communities in the north. The escalation represents the latest development in ongoing regional tensions between the two parties.
content: The Israeli military said earlier that Hezbollah had launched three projectiles towards communities in northern Israel.

zh.title: 以色列表示其军队攻击了贝鲁特南郊真主党目标
zh.summary: 以色列军队对贝鲁特南郊的真主党目标进行了打击，以回应该组织向以色列北部社区发射三枚炮弹。这次升级代表了双方之间持续地区紧张局势的最新发展。

title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
summary: Mark Zuckerberg recruited AI expert Alexandr Wang a year ago to lead Meta's new AI model development as part of his ambitious spending push. Despite this high-profile hiring, the initiative has produced underwhelming results, prompting Meta to reassess its AI strategy.
content: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

zh.title: Meta一年前任用Alexandr Wang开发新AI模型，扎克伯格如今不得不出售
zh.summary: 一年前，马克·扎克伯格招募AI专家Alexandr Wang领导Meta新的AI模型开发，作为其雄心勃勃的支出计划的一部分。尽管进行了这一高调招聘，但该计划取得了令人失望的成果，促使Meta重新评估其AI战略。

title: Trump heads to G7 summit in France as world awaits Iran deal
summary: As global tensions over Iran dominate international attention, the G7 summit in France will address multiple geopolitical crises. The ongoing Ukraine conflict and Russia's military operations are also expected to be major discussion points alongside the Iran situation.
content: The Iran war has drawn the world's focus, but the G7 is also likely to address Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe.

zh.title: 特朗普前往法国G7峰会，世界等待伊朗协议
zh.summary: 随着伊朗全球紧张局势主导国际关注，法国G7峰会将解决多个地缘政治危机。正在进行的乌克兰冲突和俄罗斯的军事行动也预计将与伊朗局势一起成为主要讨论点。

title: JetBlue bets big on Fort Lauderdale, from a new airport lounge to an international gateway
summary: JetBlue is making significant investments in Fort Lauderdale including a new airport lounge and expanded international operations through the hub. The expansion aims to help the airline compete more effectively with American Airlines' dominant presence at nearby Miami International Airport.
content: JetBlue faces heavy competition from Miami International Airport, an American Airlines stronghold.

zh.title: JetBlue在劳德代尔堡大举投资，从新机场休息室到国际枢纽
zh.summary: JetBlue正在劳德代尔堡进行重大投资，包括新建机场休息室和通过枢纽扩展国际业务。这一扩展旨在帮助该航空公司与美国航空公司在附近迈阿密国际机场的主导地位更有效地竞争。

title: Swiss voters set to reject population cap in referendum, avoiding EU clash
summary: Swiss voters are poised to reject a population cap referendum, preventing a potential conflict with the European Union over labor migration. The rejected measure had concerned businesses that feared it could restrict free movement of workers between Switzerland and EU member states.
content: The referendum had put businesses on edge due to concerns it could lead to the end of free movement of labor between Switzerland and the EU.

zh.title: 瑞士选民有望在公投中拒绝人口上限，避免与欧盟冲突
zh.summary: 瑞士选民准备拒绝人口上限公投，防止与欧盟在劳动力流动问题上的潜在冲突。被拒绝的提案让担心的企业害怕它可能会限制瑞士与欧盟成员国之间的工人自由流动。

title: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
summary: While Elon Musk and Larry Page have grown distant personally over the past decade, their companies SpaceX and Google are now more closely aligned than ever. Both celebrated following SpaceX's highly successful initial public offering this week despite the personal distance between the leaders.
content: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克十多年前与拉里·佩奇渐行渐远，但他们的公司却比以往更亲密
zh.summary: 虽然埃隆·马斯克和拉里·佩奇在过去十年里个人距离越来越远，但他们的公司SpaceX和谷歌现在比以往任何时候都更紧密一致。尽管领导人之间的个人距离很远，但在SpaceX本周首次公开募股大获成功后，两家公司都表示庆祝。

title: I’m 60, retired with $3 million. My fiancée, 55, only has $1 million and plans to keep working. Are we compatible?
summary: A 60-year-old retiree with $3 million is questioning compatibility with a 55-year-old fiancée who has only $1 million saved and plans to continue working. The significant wealth gap and different financial philosophies, including the fiancée's lack of investment discipline despite frugal spending, have raised concerns.
content: “Although she is quite frugal, she has not been particularly diligent with investing.”

zh.title: 我今年60岁，退休了，有300万美元。我55岁的未婚妻只有100万美元，计划继续工作。我们相容吗？
zh.summary: 一位拥有300万美元的60岁退休人士在质疑与仅存100万美元的55岁未婚妻的兼容性，而后者计划继续工作。巨大的财富差距和不同的财务理念，包括未婚妻尽管生活节俭但缺乏投资纪律，引发了担忧。

title: Man who built Guernsey finance charity retires
summary: Peter Neville is retiring from his leadership role at the Guernsey finance charity he founded that serves people excluded from traditional banking. His retirement marks the end of an era for an organization that has provided crucial financial support to underserved communities.
content: Peter Neville stands down as head of the charity supporting people ineligible for mainstream banking.

zh.title: 建立根西岛金融慈善机构的男子退休
zh.summary: 彼得·内维尔正从他创办的根西岛金融慈善机构的领导职位上退休，该机构为被传统银行排斥的人们服务。他的退休标志着一个为服务不足社区提供关键财务支持的组织时代的终结。

title: Fund boosts support for financial struggles
summary: A new £300,000 fund has been established to expand financial support services for Devon residents facing economic hardship and financial pressures. The funding will enhance existing programs helping those struggling with money management and financial insecurity.
content: The £300k fund will expand support for residents struggling with financial pressures in Devon.

zh.title: 基金加强对财务困难的支持
zh.summary: 已建立了一个新的30万英镑基金，以扩大对面临经济困难和财务压力的德文郡居民的财务支持服务。该资金将加强现有计划，帮助那些在金钱管理和财务不安全方面苦苦挣扎的人。

title: After 53 years, the New York Knicks are NBA champions. And the wait sure seemed worth it
summary: The New York Knicks won the NBA championship for the first time since 1973, ending a 53-year drought by defeating the San Antonio Spurs in five games. The historic victory represents a major milestone for the franchise and its long-suffering fan base.
content: The New York Knicks are NBA champions for the first time since 1973, beating the San Antonio Spurs in five games.

zh.title: 53年后，纽约尼克斯队赢得NBA冠军。漫长的等待确实值得了
zh.summary: 纽约尼克斯队在时隔50多年后首次赢得NBA冠军，在五场比赛中击败圣安东尼奥马刺队，结束了53年的冠军荒。这场历史性的胜利代表了这支球队及其长期苦苦等待的球迷们的重大里程碑。

title: UK forces board sanctioned Russian shadow fleet oil tanker
summary: U.K. forces boarded a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker named SMYRTOS while it was in the English Channel and will hold it off the south coast for investigation. The action is part of ongoing efforts to enforce international sanctions against Russia's covert maritime shipping network.
content: The U.K.'s Ministry of Defence says the SMYRTOS was in the English Channel and will be held off the south coast during investigations.

zh.title: 英国军队查获被制裁的俄罗斯幽灵船队油轮
zh.summary: 英国军队在英吉利海峡对一艘名为SMYRTOS的俄罗斯幽灵船队油轮进行了登船检查，并将其扣押在南海岸进行调查。此举是持续执行针对俄罗斯秘密海上运输网络的国际制裁的一部分。

title: David James backs affordable football kit charities
summary: Former England goalkeeper David James is advocating for affordable football kit charities to ensure that equipment costs don't prevent aspiring players from participating in the sport. His support highlights the importance of removing financial barriers to youth football participation.
content: The former England goalie does not want costly kit to be a bar to anyone hoping to play football.

zh.title: 大卫·詹姆斯支持平价足球装备慈善机构
zh.summary: 前英格兰门将大卫·詹姆斯倡导平价足球装备慈善机构，确保设备成本不会阻止有抱负的球员参与运动。他的支持强调了消除青少年足球参与经济障碍的重要性。

title: Why the US economy keeps defying the odds
summary: The US economy has consistently outperformed many of its global peers despite exposure to the same worldwide economic shocks and challenges. The article examines the factors behind America's economic resilience and stronger-than-expected performance.
content: Why has the American economy continued to outperform so many of its peers, despite facing the same global shocks?

zh.title: 美国经济为何不断超出预期
zh.summary: 尽管面临同样的全球经济冲击和挑战，美国经济的表现持续优于许多全球同行。这篇文章审视了美国经济韧性和超预期表现背后的因素。

title: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
summary: A homeowner paid $160 to a plumber to fix a constantly refilling toilet cistern that was making a hissing noise, but the repair allegedly created a new problem. The case raises questions about service liability and whether additional payment is owed for damages caused during the original repair.
content: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”

zh.title: 我的管道工收费160美元修复卫生间水箱——但又造成了另一个问题。我还要再付钱吗？
zh.summary: 房主支付160美元给管道工修复持续补水且发出嘶鸣声的卫生间水箱，但据称该维修造成了新问题。这个案例引发了关于服务责任的问题，以及是否应为原始维修期间造成的损害支付额外费用。
